name: @malindarathnayake/engram
description: Graph-based memory MCP server for OpenClaw bots using Apache AGE on PostgreSQL

scripts.build:bridge: cd plugins/engram-bridge && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:bridge
scripts.pack:all: npm run build:all && mkdir -p artifacts && npm pack --pack-destination artifacts/ && cd plugins/engram-bridge && npm pack --pack-destination ../../artifacts/ && npm run pack:zip
scripts.test:integration: vitest run tests/db/ tests/graph/ tests/schema/ tests/integration/
